name: public_safety_satellite_derived_cedar_ind_col
premise: Mutual-aid crews from another county arrived with incompatible radio encryption; command needs a comms decision now. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety satellite derived cedar ind col has converged with local pressure in the Harborline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both individual and collective; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Ravi Reed
agents.identity: I am Ravi Reed, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elena Chen
agents.identity: I am Elena Chen, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect collective.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to collective to secure individual before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Ravi Reed must choose under individual versus collective. What does Ravi Reed do?
